texto: Who would know but ten years ago that kids would be texting each other all the time, that that would be one of their main forms of communication. And so many times, these kids know more about the technology than their parents. And so many times, we're putting kids in very adult situations and expecting them to behave like they're 40 years old.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amy Klobuchar: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Who would know but ten years ago that kids would be texting each other all the time, that that wo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, time, technology pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de technology e parents.

texto: My dad was a sports writer when I was younger and then he became just a general columnist. But I grew up with him literally getting into brawls with football coaches.

texto: Finally, a good prosecutor knows that her job is to enforce the law without fear or favor. Likewise, a Supreme Court Justice must interpret the laws without fear or favor.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amy Klobuchar sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “Finally, a good prosecutor knows that her job is to enforce the law without fear or favor. Likewi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, good, justice, útil em momentos de justice e law.
